title: Quick Guide - Osprey/Tern - Custom Swipe animation screen
scenario: Quick Guide Custom Swipe animation Replay button does not interrupt playback when tapping screen or swiping on Osprey/Tern
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with an Osprey or Tern device connected.
2. Open the Quick Guide from the Home screen.
3. Navigate to the 2nd screen (showing two earbuds).
4. Tap the right blue circle to zoom into the earbud and play the Custom Swipe animation.
5. Wait for the animation to complete.
7. During the animation playback, tap anywhere on the screen.
8. During the animation playback, swipe left or right.
9. After the animation completes (zoomed in view), tap the blue circle again.
expected:
1. App launches successfully with Osprey/Tern connected.
2. Quick Guide opens.
3. 2nd screen displays two earbuds.
4. View zooms into the right earbud and the Custom Swipe animation plays.
5. A 'Replay' button appears after animation completes.
6. Animation replays while staying zoomed in.
7. Tapping anywhere on screen does not interrupt playback.
8. Swiping left/right does not interrupt playback.
9. Tapping the blue circle again zooms out to show both earbuds.
